summary: Robinhood expands its vision for AI-powered investingRobinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) is accelerating its push into artificial intelligence, with Chief Executive Officer Vlad Tenev predicting that AI agents will soon be capable of matching the skills of human traders.
